title: EnergyEfficiencyLabel

imageDescription.description:
A brief verbal summary of the information included on the Energy Efficiency Label for an item.

For example, On a scale of A to G the rating is E.

imageURL.description: The URL to the Energy Efficiency Label image that is applicable to an item.

productInformationSheet.description: The URL to the Product Information Sheet that provides complete manufacturer-provided efficiency information about an item.

description: This container provides information about the energy efficiency for certain durable goods.
